title: Human Reports, Machine Output, Terminal Width, and Accessibility
description: The report encodes meaning only with color, clips long words, changes columns by terminal width, mixes diagnostics with JSON stdout, and gives screen-reader users an unlabeled number grid. Learners cumulatively produce accessible human and machine report system through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Order title, input identity, policy, totals, rankings, limitations, and next actions around the reader decision.
Reserve stdout for requested report data and stderr for diagnostics while keeping exit status consistent.
Use a declared width or detected terminal width with minimums, wrapping, long-token policy, and snapshot tests.
